name: Scallion Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Cold unsalted butter, cut into bits
1/4 cup Minced scallion, including the green part
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Add freshly ground pepper to taste.
2. Blend in the cold butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Stir in the minced scallion and plain yogurt, combining the mixture until it just forms a soft, sticky dough.
4. Scoop heaping tablespoons of dough onto a buttered baking sheet.
5. Bake the biscuits in the center of a preheated 425°F oven for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Makes about 6 biscuits.
